creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
See discussions on the wireless mailing list about this from yesterday including a solution from Kyle how to do it from loader if really needed.

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-wireless/2021-December/000148.html

The bottom line is that eventually the drivers should just auto-load one the appropriate change got committed.

In the meantime rc.conf kld_list seems to be the best option.

I'll keep this open a few more days to remind me to update the man pages and wiki page with the details.
